summary_text: ### 修正対象 `scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff --- a/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs +++ b/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs @@ import failoverModule from "./lib/failover.js"; import timeoutTrackerModule from "./lib/timeout-tracker.js"; import outputFormatModule from "./lib/output-format.js"; +import outputFilterModule from "./lib/output-filter.js"; @@ const { getFailoverChain, isFailoverEligible } = failoverModule; const { getAdaptiveTimeout, recordLatency } = timeoutTrackerModule; const { generateRunId, safeJsonParse, stripAnsi } = outputFormatModule; +const { redactSecrets } = outputFilterModule; @@ function persistLaneOutput(record) { ensureDir(LANE_OUTPUT_DIR); + const redactedStdout = redactSecrets(String(record.stdout || "")); + const redactedStderr = redactSecrets(String(record.stderr || "")); + const redactedArgs = Array.isArray(record.args) + ? record.args.map((arg, index, args) => { + if (args[index - 1] === "-t") { + return redactSecrets(String(arg || "")).text; + } + return arg; + }) + : record.args; const safeName = String(record.name || `${record.provider}-${record.agent}`) .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/g, "-") .slice(0, 80) || "lane"; const outputPath = path.join(LANE_OUTPUT_DIR, `${Date.now()}-${safeName}.json`); - writeJsonAtomic(outputPath, record); + writeJsonAtomic(outputPath, { + ...record, + args: redactedArgs, + stdout: redactedStdout.text, + stderr: redactedStderr.text, + }); return outputPath; } @@ -async function runSingleAttempt({ name, requestedProvider, provider, agent, task, project, timeoutMs, runId, optional }) { +async function runSingleAttempt({ name, requestedProvider, provider, agent, task, project, timeoutMs, runId, optional, persistProviderState = true }) { @@ - updateProviderState({ - requestedProvider, - provider, - agent, - ok: true, - latencyMs, - error: null, - failedOverFrom: requestedProvider !== provider ? requestedProvider : null, - }); + if (persistProviderState) { + updateProviderState({ + requestedProvider, + provider, + agent, + ok: true, + latencyMs, + error: null, + failedOverFrom: requestedProvider !== provider ? requestedProvider : null, + }); + } @@ - updateProviderState({ - requestedProvider, - provider, - agent, - ok: false, - latencyMs, - error, - failedOverFrom: requestedProvider !== provider ? requestedProvider : null, - }); + if (persistProviderState) { + updateProviderState({ + requestedProvider, + provider, + agent, + ok: false, + latencyMs, + error, + failedOverFrom: requestedProvider !== provider ? requestedProvider : null, + }); + } @@ -async function runLaneWithFailover({ name, provider, agent, task, project, timeoutMs, optional = false }) { +async function runLaneWithFailover({ name, provider, agent, task, project, timeoutMs, optional = false, persistProviderState = true }) { @@ timeoutMs, runId, optional, + persistProviderState, }); @@ const settled = await Promise.allSettled( lanes.map((lane) => runLaneWithFailover({ ...lane, timeoutMs: lane.timeoutMs || getAdaptiveTimeout(lane.provider === "codex-spark" ? "codex" : lane.provider, lane.agent), + persistProviderState: false, }), ), ); @@ const results = settled.map((entry, index) => { @@ }); + + for (const [index, result] of results.entries()) { + updateProviderState({ + requestedProvider: result.requestedProvider || lanes[index].provider || result.provider, + provider: result.provider, + agent: result.agent, + ok: result.ok, + latencyMs: result.latencyMs, + error: result.ok ? null : result.error, + failedOverFrom: result.failedOverFrom, + }); + } ``` ### 検証結果 - `node --check scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` は成功しました。 - 仮定: - DLP対策対象の「task string in args」は `-t` の直後の引数を指す前提でマスクしています。 - 単一レーン実行の既存挙動は維持し、`handleMatrix()` のみ state 更新を `Promise.allSettled` 後の逐次処理へ変更しています。
